items.title: Conversation practice
items.body:
Answer aloud first. Then complete the exercises.

Examples:
• 1. What do you _______________________ to drink for dinner?
• 2. Do you _______________________ with your sister?
• 5. Do you _______________________ English at home?
• 3- What do you like to study at school?
• 5- Do you have time to study with me now?

items.text: 1. What do you _______________________ to drink for dinner?

items.prompt: Choose the English sentence for: Eu tenho que estudar Eu quero entender
options: I have to study I want to understand 3.
You have to study I want to understand
understand to want I study to have I
I have to study I want to understand

items.prompt: Choose the English sentence for: Você tem que dormir. Eu quero entender.
options: You have to sleep I you want to understand Engl ish.
I have to sleep I you want to understand Engl ish.
You have to sleep You you want to understand Engl ish.
ish Engl understand to want you I sleep to have You.

items.prompt: Choose the English sentence for: Eu tenho que trabalhar. Eu tenho que entender Ch inês.
options: Chinese understand to have I work to have I
I have to work I have to understand Chinese
I have to work I have to understand Chinese 3.
You have to work I have to understand Chinese

items.answer: 3- What do you like to study at school?
5- Do you have time to study with me now?
